title: clypeola edentula
intro: Clypeola edentula, also known as the little duck's bill or white cockle, is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Clypeola edentula include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce joint pain, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
